pagination.mechanism: All active notices appear to be rendered in a single list. No pagination controls observed in HTML.

requires_subpages.reason: All relevant fields (title, nämnd, publicerat, till och med, mötesdatum/sammanträdesdatum) are present inline in each list item. Documents link to netpublicator.com for PDFs but case data is complete in the list.

javascript_notes: Content is rendered by a React app (data-reactroot on #bulletinboard). A plain HTTP fetch will return an empty shell. A headless browser (e.g. Playwright/Puppeteer) must be used and must wait for ul.bbl-list li.bbl-item to be populated before scraping.

filter_hints.note: Filters are Chosen.js multi-selects. To filter programmatically, set values on the underlying <select> elements and trigger change events, or simply scrape all items and filter client-side by bbl-item-title-small text and/or title content.

field_notes.title: span.bbl-item-title — contains full permit description including fastighet and diarienummer e.g. 'Bygglov för tillbyggnad av källare Svärdfisken 11 Gäddvägen 2 MSN-B 2026-170'
field_notes.case_number: Parse from title — pattern MSN-B YYYY-NNN
field_notes.address: Parse from title — typically includes fastighet name and street address
field_notes.published: data-published attribute on li.bbl-item or first bbl-subitem-col text

notes: The bulletinboard is served via Netpublicator (board ID 700c95ca-d78b-4a23-8e95-bffa7d8b43cf visible in document URLs). Check if a direct Netpublicator API endpoint exists at https://www.netpublicator.com/bulletinboard/public/700c95ca-d78b-4a23-8e95-bffa7d8b43cf/notices as this would bypass the need for a headless browser entirely. Bygglov notices are identifiable by nämnd 'Miljö- och stadsbyggnadsnämnden' and titles starting with 'Bygglov', 'Grannhörande', or 'Kungörelse om beviljat bygglov'.
